description: Delete a record. This tool always requires explicit `confirm=true` and returns a preview before execution.

confirm.description: Explicit confirmation flag required for destructive delete operations.
confirm.title: Confirm

folder_id.description: NetHunt folder identifier. Discover valid values with `list_readable_folders` or `list_writable_folders`.
folder_id.title: Folder Id

preview_only.description: When true, only compute the delete preview and do not execute the delete.
preview_only.title: Preview Only

record_id.description: NetHunt record identifier returned by record feeds, search, or create operations.
record_id.title: Record Id

name: delete_record
